testTitle: Verify sidebar shows only branding, section labels, and navigation links
preconditions: Streamlit app running on configured baseUrl
stepsToExecute: Verify section labels Parties, Customization, Sales, Inventory, Finance, and Settings
Confirm no QA expected-result paragraphs under nav links
expectedResult: Sidebar shows VayBooks branding, section labels, and page links without QA boilerplate

testTitle: Verify Customization Orders list shows staff-facing copy without QA boilerplate
preconditions: Streamlit app running on configured baseUrl with seeded orders
testDataRequired: Seeded orders O-1001, O-1002 from QA fixtures
stepsToExecute: Confirm order cards show order number, customer, status, items, advance, and bills
Confirm no orderstatus machine tokens or QA expected-result paragraphs
expectedResult: Order list shows staff-facing copy only: order number, customer, phone, readable status line, item count, advance, and bills — no QA paragraphs or orderstatus tokens
